finding.rootCause: Database sessions retained a legacy phantomforce workspace id, browser storage preferred it over active orgId, and in-memory chat was not cleared on organization switch.
finding.correction: Database and local-customer browser context now derives from active orgId; membership names resolve correctly; successful organization switches clear the visible transcript.

nextCycle: Extend the same authenticated two-organization browser proof to CRM, proposals, approvals, assets, accounting transactions, and connectors.
